entities.context: The broader operating system/knowledge management system that Strategic Partner interfaces with

entities.name: Careerspan

entities.name: strategic thinking
entities.context: The core cognitive function that Strategic Partner externalizes and supports

entities.name: externalized cognitive architecture
entities.context: Framework describing how Strategic Partner serves as an external thinking system

entities.name: session state
entities.context: Persistent context that Strategic Partner maintains across interactions

entities.name: pending updates
entities.context: Knowledge base changes generated by Strategic Partner for V's review - never auto-applied

entities.name: unresolved tensions
entities.context: Strategic conflicts or open questions tracked for weekly review

relationships.context: Primary interface between V's thinking and the entire N5 system
Integrates automatically with knowledge base in read-only mode
Provides challenge, stress testing, and synthesis aligned with Careerspan priority modes
Transforms vague strategic hunches into validated, actionable strategies
Described as V's externalized cognitive architecture
Maintains session state and learns patterns over time
Generates pending updates for review rather than auto-applying to knowledge
Tracks unresolved tensions for weekly review
